expectations.text: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
expectations.evidence: Found 38 data-testid attributes across all components following {component}-{element}-{action} convention

expectations.text: Images use data-asset placeholder convention (not placeholder URLs)
expectations.evidence: Found 4 data-asset attributes for product images, brand logo, and empty state illustration

expectations.text: Zustand state in dedicated store file with selector hooks (no bare useStore)
expectations.evidence: useCartStore.ts with 8 selector hooks (useCartItems, useCartActions, useCartCount, useCartTotal). Zero bare useStore() calls

expectations.text: Page decomposed into multiple focused components (not monolithic)
expectations.evidence: 18 files total: 12 TSX components + 6 TS modules. Well-separated concerns

expectations.text: Uses Tailwind v4 patterns (shadow-xs, inset-ring, focus-visible:, @theme)
expectations.evidence: 9 Tailwind v4 patterns found including @theme inline config, shadow-xs, focus-visible: states. Dedicated catalog.css with v4 theme
Zero instances of ': any', 'as any', or '<any>' found

expectations.text: Responsive design with mobile breakpoint handling
expectations.evidence: 10 responsive breakpoint classes. Grid adapts, sidebar hidden on mobile
